courseName: Turbine Aeroplane Aerodynamics Structures and Systems 2
deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
standardRef: EASA PART 66 MODULE 11A TURBINE AEROPLANE AERODYNAMICS STRUCTURES AND SYSTEMS
learningOutcomes:
Be able to know, understand, explain and apply the Air Conditioning and Cabin
Pressurization, Safety and warning devices, Fire Protection, Ice and Rain Protection, Oxygen
and Pneumatic system and have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a
habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to know the Air Conditioning and Cabin Pressurization, Safety and warning
devices, Fire Protection, Ice and Rain Protection, Oxygen and Pneumatic system.
2. Be able to understand the Air Conditioning and Cabin Pressurization, Safety and
warning, Fire Protection, Ice and Rain Protection, Oxygen and Pneumatic system.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply the Air Conditioning and Cabin Pressurization, Safety and warning
devices, Fire Protection, Ice and Rain Protection, Oxygen and Pneumatic system knowledge in
higher education.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the Air Conditioning and Cabin Pressurization, Safety
and warning devices, Fire Protection, Ice and Rain Protection, Oxygen and Pneumatic system.
2. Apply their knowledge of the Air Conditioning, Cabin Pressurization, Safety and
warning devices, Fire Protection, Ice and Rain Protection, Oxygen and Pneumatic system in
higher education.
description:
To study about Air Conditioning and Cabin Pressurization (ATA 21) should learn Air
supply, Air Conditioning, Pressurization and Safety and warning devices, Fire Protection ATA 26
including Fire and smoke detection, warning systems and Portable fire extinguisher, Ice and
Rain Protection ATA 30, Oxygen ATA 35 and Pneumatic system ATA 36.
